properties.action_jun12: cancelled planned strikes; claimed deal 'approved at highest level'; Truth Social: deal covers 11 nations; blockade remains; threatened Kharg Island seizure then admitted 'not sure America has the stomach'; 'ended the war with Iran'; whiplash: 'VERY HARD TONIGHT' → cancellation same day
denies deal: Fars 'no text approved', FM 'merely speculation', 'no final decision'; Hormuz declared closed to all marine traffic; 2nd night retaliatory attacks on US bases

2nd consecutive night attacks on US bases: Ali Al Salem, Ahmed Al Jaber (Kuwait), Sheikh Isa (Bahrain); 18 targets in 2 waves; claims F-35 hangar destruction at Al-Azraq; declares Hormuz closed to all marine traffic; attacks 2 tankers in Hormuz
